zh.lifeSummary: 當Heinrich I. von Vianden於1190年出生在盧森堡維安德時，他的父親Friedrich III. von Vianden30歲，母親Mathilde von der Neuerburg29歲。他和Marguerite de Courtenay至少有2個兒子和3個女兒。他去世於1252年11月19日享年62歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Heinrich I. von Vianden于1190年出生在卢森堡維安德时，他的父亲Friedrich III. von Vianden30岁，母亲Mathilde von der Neuerburg29岁。他和Marguerite de Courtenay至少有2个儿子和3个女儿。他去世于1252年11月19日享年62岁。

nameMeanings.name: von
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Cambodian: written វ៉ុន, unexplained.

variants.name: Vaughan
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

nameMeanings.name: Heinrich
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Henry
meanings: A perennially popular given name, of Continental Germanic origin, from haim ‘home’ + rīc ‘power, ruler’. It was an Old French name, adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. It has been borne by eight kings of England. Not until the 17th century did the form Henry (as opposed to Harry ) become the standard vernacular form, mainly under the influence of the Latin form Henricus and French Henri.

en.lifeSummary: When Heinrich I. von Vianden was born in 1190, in Vianden, Luxembourg, his father, Friedrich III. von Vianden, was 30 and his mother, Mathilde von der Neuerburg, was 29. He had at least 2 sons and 3 daughters with Marguerite de Courtenay. He died on 19 November 1252, at the age of 62.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Heinrich I. von Vianden est né en 1190, à Vianden, Luxembourg, son père, Friedrich III. von Vianden, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Mathilde von der Neuerburg, avait 29 ans. Il a eu au moins 2 fils et 3 filles avec Marguerite de Courtenay. Il est décédé le 19 novembre 1252, à l’âge de 62 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Heinrich I. von Vianden 1190 in Vianden, Luxemburg geboren wurde, war sein Vater Friedrich III. von Vianden 30 und seine Mutter Mathilde von der Neuerburg 29. Er hatte mit Marguerite de Courtenay mindestens 2 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb am 19. November 1252 im Alter von 62 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Heinrich I. von Vianden è nato il nel 1190 nel Vianden, Lussemburgo, il suo padre, Friedrich III. von Vianden, aveva 30 anni e il suo madre, Mathilde von der Neuerburg, aveva 29 anni. Lui avuto almeno 2 figli e 3 figlie con Marguerite de Courtenay. Morì il 19 novembre 1252, all'età di 62 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Heinrich I. von Viandenが1190年にルクセンブルクヴィアンデンで生まれた時，父Friedrich III. von Viandenは30歳，母Mathilde von der Neuerburgは29歳であった。彼はMarguerite de Courtenayとの間に少なくとも2人の息子と3人の娘をもうけた。彼は1252年11月19日に62歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Heinrich I. von Vianden(이)가 1190년 룩셈부르크 비누든에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Friedrich III. von Vianden(은)는 30세였고, 그의 어머니 Mathilde von der Neuerburg(은)는 29세였다. 그는 Marguerite de Courtenay(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1252년 11월 19일 62세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Heinrich I. von Vianden nasceu em 1190, em Vianden, Luxemburgo, seu pai, Friedrich III. von Vianden, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Mathilde von der Neuerburg, tinha 29 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 2 filhos e 3 filhas com Marguerite de Courtenay. Ele faleceu em 19 de novembro de 1252, com 62 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Heinrich I. von Vianden родился в 1190 г. в местности вянден, Люксембург, его отцу по имени Friedrich III. von Vianden было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Mathilde von der Neuerburg, 29. У него было по крайней мере 2 сына и 3 дочери от Marguerite de Courtenay. Он умер 19 ноября 1252 г. в возрасте 62 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Heinrich I. von Vianden nació en 1190, en Vianden, Luxemburgo, su papá, Friedrich III. von Vianden, tenía 30 años y su mamá, Mathilde von der Neuerburg, tenía 29 años. Tuvo por lo menos 2 hijos y 3 hijas con Marguerite de Courtenay. Murió el 19 de noviembre de 1252, a la edad de 62 años.
